name: 26"x26" Quilt Euro Square Throw Pillow Sour Cream - Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia
description:
Bring understated style and comfort to your seating ensemble or bed with this Quilt Euro Square Throw Pillow from Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia. Constructed from 100% cotton voile fabric with recycled polyester filling to offer cushioned comfort, this square throw pillow showcases a gorgeous quilted stitch pattern with flange edges in a cream hue to match any style aesthetic. Simply place it with coordinating lumbar pillows to create elegant bedroom decor.

Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia: Gather • Create • Enjoy
